संयु榉त सिचव, भारत सरकार 獧ारा उ榉त उप धारा के तहत 琈दनांक 12.02.2019 को पीडी-12001/05/2019-कोफेपोसा के तहत जारी आदेश म犆 यह िनदेश 琈दया गया था 琈क 炈ी सूफ琉यान ठे榉के क瀈नीपोियल सुपु灴 炈ी अ瀑दुल खादर, िनवासी वाराला獉 परमबाथ, डाक वावड, कोडुव瀖ली, कोझीकोड-673572 को िहरासत म犆 िलया िलया जाए और के瀈灶ीय कारागार व सुधार गृह, ित牱वंनतपुरम म犆 रखा जाए ता琈क भिव瀠य म犆 उ瀈ह犆 माल क琉 त瀡करी करने, त瀡करी को c<+kok nsus] त瀡करी का माल लाने-ले जाने ;k eky Nqikus ;k j[kus }kjk vU;Fkk ls rLdjh ds िनिष獳 माल का धंधा करने से रोका जा सके। 2. जब琈क के瀈灶 सरकार के पास यह िव瀙वास करने के कारण ह犉 琈क पूव犙榉त 瀘यि榉त भगोड़ा है या अपने को िछपाए 牣ए है ता琈क आदेश का तामील न 琈कया जा सके। -- 1 of 2 -- 2 THE GAZETTE OF INDIA : EXTRAORDINARY [PART II—SEC. 3(ii)] 3. अत:, अब, उ榉त अिधिनयम क琉 धारा 7 क琉 उप-धारा (1) के खंड (ख) 獧ारा 灹द瀄त शि榉तय犘 का 灹योग करते 牣ए, के瀈灶 सरकार एतद獧ारा पूव犙榉त 瀘यि榉त को िनदेश देती है 琈क सरकारी राजप灴 म犆 इस आदेश के 灹काशन क琉 ितिथ से सात 琈दन के अंदर वह पुिलस महािनदेशक, केरल सरकार ित牱वनंतपुरम के सामने उपि瀡थत हो। [सं. पी.डी.-12001/05/2019-कोफेपोसा] रिव 灹ताप 琐सह,,,, संयु榉त सिचव MINISTRY OF FINANCE Department of Revenue CENTRAL ECONOMIC INTELLIGENCE BUREAU (COFEPOSA WING) ORDER New Delhi, the 21st May, 2019 S.O. 1790(E).— Whereas the Joint Secretary to the Government of India, specially empowered under sub- section (1) of Section 3 of the Conservation of Foreign Exchange and Prevention of Smuggling Activities Act, 1974 (52 of 1974) issued Order No. PD-12001/05/2019-COFEPOSA dated 12.02.2019 under the said sub-section directing that Shri Sufiyan Thekke Kannipoyil, S/o Abdul Khadar, R/o Varalatt Parambath, P.O. Vavad, Koduvally, Kozhikode- 673572 be detained and kept in Central Prison & Correctional Home, Thiruvananthapuram with a view to preventing him from smuggling of goods, abetting the smuggling of goods and dealing in smuggled goods otherwise than by engaging in transporting or concealing or keeping smuggled goods in future. 2. Whereas the Central Government has reasons to believe that the aforesaid person has absconded or has been concealing himself so that the Order cannot be executed. 3. Now, therefore, in exercise of the powers conferred by clause (b) of sub-section (1) of Section 7 of the said Act, the Central Government hereby directs the aforesaid person to appear before the Director General of Police, Government of Kerala, Thiruvananthapuram within 7 days of the publication of this Order in the Official Gazette. [No. P.D.-12001/05/2019-COFEPOSA] RAVI PRATAP SINGH, Jt. Secy. Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. -- 2 of 2 --
